message:
fix: Correct test.utils import paths in 6 remaining test files

Fixed import path from '../../../test.utils' to '../../test.utils' in:
- tests/unit/memory/memory-backends.test.ts
- tests/unit/terminal/terminal-manager.test.ts
- tests/unit/core/enhanced-orchestrator.test.ts
- tests/unit/mcp/mcp-interface.test.ts
- tests/unit/mcp/server.test.ts
- tests/unit/mcp/tools.test.ts

These files were missed in Commit 3 and causing 'Cannot find module' errors
specifically on ubuntu Node 20 platform.

Fixes Test Verification (ubuntu-latest, Node 20) failure.
